headline: Kraft Dinner Expands Beyond Mac n’ Cheese with All-New KD Ramen Lineup
summary: TORONTO, June 22, 2026--Kraft Dinner (KD) is taking its iconic cheesy flavour beyond mac n’ cheese with the launch of KD Ramen. Available in three craveable varieties, Cheesy Ramen, Extra Cheesy and Extra Spicy, the new KD Ramen lineup brings the unmistakable taste of KD to the ramen aisle in an exciting new format.

headline: Less Volume, More Premium: Post-Ozempic Economics Are Killing The Quantity Model
summary: As millions take GLP-1 drugs, packaged food giants face declining volumes while protein brands and specialty grocers win.
